history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young woman with dark brown hair, styled in loose waves that fall to her shoulders, looks into a smartphone held in her right hand. She is taking a selfie in a dimly lit room, with a plain, dark brown wall serving as the background. Her makeup is prominent, featuring shimmery eyeshadow, a peachy blush applied generously to her cheeks, and glossy, plump lips. She wears a black camisole with a floral pattern in shades of green, brown, and orange. A delicate silver chain with a small, black clover-shaped pendant rests on her collarbone. The lighting is soft and directional, casting subtle shadows and highlighting her features, creating an intimate and slightly moody atmosphere. The overall color palette is warm and muted, dominated by earthy tones.
